title: MEDICAL-TECHNICAL SYSTEM OF DIAGNOSTIC DISORDERS OF THE FUNCTION OF GLUCOSE ABSORPTION IN THE INTESTINE
author: Lapta S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The indirect medico-technical method of measurement of the glucose absorption intensity in the patient's intestine is proposed. It's normal temporary dependence was found. By the deviation degree of the patient's glucose absorption function from the normal one, it was proposed to introduce the quantitative characteristics of malabsorption.
steps_raw: The indirect medico-technical method of measurement of the glucose absorption intensity in the patient's intestine is proposed. It's normal temporary dependence was found. By the deviation degree of the patient's glucose absorption function from the normal one, it was proposed to introduce the quantitative characteristics of malabsorption.
keywords: diagnostic system, malabsorption, mathematical model, differential equation.
